name: Jim's Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all the fat off the meat and slice into 1/4-inch thick strips.
2. Mix the other ingredients together.
3. Marinate the meat overnight in the mixture.
4. Line cookie sheets with foil and arrange the meat in a single layer on the sheets.
5. Dry at 200°F for 8 or more hours, turning the meat every 2 hours.
6. Cool and store in a tightly covered jar or sealed plastic bag.
Other marinade ingredients (optional):
1/2 tsp to 1 tbsp hot pepper sauce or 1/4 tsp cayenne
1 tbsp liquid smoke
1 tbsp parsley flakes
1/2 tsp ginger
1/2 tsp allspice
